api_key_2.description: dbt Cloud service token, sent as the Authorization header in the form 'Token <api_key_2>'. Never logged.

account_id.description: dbt Cloud account ID; every stream is scoped under /accounts/{account_id}/.

base_url.description: dbt Cloud Administrative API v2 base URL override for tests or self-hosted instances.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
